mapper.select: SELECT id, tool_type, name, url, auth_type, username, credential, active, created_at, updated_at FROM support_tool ORDER BY tool_type, name
SELECT id, tool_type, name, url, auth_type, username, credential, active, created_at, updated_at FROM support_tool WHERE tool_type = #{toolType} AND active = true LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_tool (tool_type, name, url, auth_type, username, credential, active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{toolType}, #{name}, #{url}, #{authType}, #{username}, #{credential}, #{active}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE support_tool SET tool_type = #{toolType}, name = #{name}, url = #{url}, auth_type = #{authType}, username = #{username}, credential = #{credential}, active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
